title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
